rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"IS_SCRIPT","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"run","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Deploys GNDMStaking as a UUPS proxy. Standalone \u2014 does not touch         GunplaCard, GundaniumGame, or PrizePool. Key injection (two options \u2014 pick one):   A) cast wallet keystore (recommended):        cast wallet import deployer --interactive        forge script ... --account deployer      (no DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY needed in .env)   B) env var fallback (pass at runtime, not stored):        DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY=0x... forge script ... Required env vars:   GNDM_ADDRESS           \u2014 $GNDM token address on the target chain Usage (Base Sepolia):   forge script script/DeployStaking.s.sol \\     --rpc-url $BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC \\     --account deployer \\     --broadcast \\     --verify \\     -vvvv Usage (Base Mainnet):   forge script script/DeployStaking.s.sol \\     --rpc-url $BASE_MAINNET_RPC \\     --account deployer \\     --broadcast \\     --verify \\     -vvvv After deploy: paste the logged proxy address into   src/lib/contracts/addresses.ts  (GNDM_STAKING key) then redeploy the
